_doc: Per-image Gemini prompts for The Compliant Tracking Stack for Professionals. {palette} resolves at runtime. Follows feedback_image_prompt_construction.md rules.

cover.prompt:
Editorial book cover for a downloadable lead magnet PDF. Aspect: portrait, 3:4, US letter book cover proportions.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES (read first):
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed under TEXT TO RENDER below. No other text. No font names. No instructions. No labels beyond what is listed. No platform brand logos.
2. Never render the words "Inter", "Inter Regular", "Inter Display Bold", "JetBrains Mono", "sans serif", or any typography or font instruction inside the image.
3. Spell every rendered word exactly as written, character for character. No garbled or distorted characters. No misspellings.

TEXT TO RENDER (exactly these pieces, nothing else):
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase, two words: FREE PLAYBOOK
B. Upper-left massive headline across three lines: line 1 reads "The", line 2 reads "Compliant", line 3 reads "Tracking Stack".
C. Subtitle inside a horizontal off-white translucent panel below the headline, two lines: line 1 reads "For doctors, lawyers, and home service.", line 2 reads "Tracking that holds up."
D. Below the subtitle panel, a small uppercase label, three words: INSIDE THIS PLAYBOOK
E. A grid of 8 small pills below the INSIDE THIS PLAYBOOK label, arranged as 2 rows of 4 pills. The 4 pills in the top row read, left to right: "GA4", "GTM", "Meta CAPI", "Google Ads". The 4 pills in the bottom row read, left to right: "TikTok", "CallRail", "Consent Mode v2", "GSC API".
F. Bottom-left small wordmark: AI BrandFactory

TYPOGRAPHY (apply these settings; do not display the setting names):
- Headline: massive bold sans-serif display face, off-white #FAF9FF, tight letter spacing.
- Subtitle: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B color, centered inside the off-white panel.
- Top-left pill text: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- INSIDE THIS PLAYBOOK label: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4, small.
- Pill grid text: clean sans-serif medium weight, off-white #FAF9FF, small. Each pill is a rounded rectangle with a thin bright cyan #06B6D4 outline and a translucent dark indigo fill. Pills are uniformly sized.
- Wordmark: clean light-weight sans-serif, off-white.

Design language:
- Premium funnel-art style in the spirit of Peng Joon and Russell Brunson, stripped of ornament. Editorial restraint, not hype.
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient at 135 degrees, with a subtle radial bloom of bright cyan in the upper right.
- Layout: the headline and subtitle occupy the upper half of the frame, left-aligned. The INSIDE THIS PLAYBOOK label and pill grid occupy the middle to lower portion of the frame, also left-aligned (the pill grid sits below the subtitle panel, taking up roughly the middle third of the cover height).
- A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan, upper-right to middle-left.
- Subtle grain texture across the whole frame to feel print-grade.

Color palette: {palette}.

What to avoid:
- No literal Google logo, no Meta logo, no Facebook logo, no TikTok logo, no GA4 logo, no platform brand marks (text labels of these names are fine inside the pills as instructed; do not render the actual brand logos or marks).
- No human faces, no avatars, no magnifying glass icons, no shopping cart icons, no padlock icons, no any icons inside the pills (pills contain text labels only, no icons).
- No code text rendered legibly anywhere.
- No stock photos, no decorative AI illustrations, no emoji, no clip art.
- No gradients other than the indigo to purple base.
- No additional pills, badges, or text beyond the 8 listed.

Output: a single high-quality cover image, print-ready, 4K.

hero.prompt:
Wide hero banner for a high-converting squeeze page that gives away "The Compliant Tracking Stack for Professionals". Aspect: 16:9 widescreen.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES (read first):
- This image contains NO rendered text.
- Do not render font names, typography labels, or instructions anywhere.

Composition: a 3D-rendered isometric mockup of a US-letter PDF cover floating slightly tilted on the right third of the frame, casting a soft drop shadow onto a textured editorial background. The PDF cover shows the same playbook design (sources flowing through a consent gate to destinations visible). On the left two-thirds: a faint repeating pipeline-with-gate motif in #06B6D4 at 12 percent opacity. A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan crosses the upper third.

Background:
- Top half: deep indigo #1A0B4B fading to electric purple #7C3AED.
- Bottom half: off-white #FAF9FF with a faint mesh gradient bloom.
- The PDF mockup sits on the dividing line between the two halves.
- Subtle paper grain across the whole frame.

Style:
- Premium editorial. Russell Brunson book-cover-on-a-shelf energy, restrained.
- No people, no faces, no stock photography, no platform brand logos, no padlock icons, no code text.
- No icons or clip art beyond the implied pipeline-and-gate composition on the PDF mockup.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single 4K hero image.

og.prompt:
Open Graph social share card image, 1.91:1 widescreen aspect.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES (read first):
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed under TEXT TO RENDER below. No other text. No font names. No instructions. No labels beyond what is listed.
2. Never render the words "Inter", "Inter Regular", "Inter Display Bold", "JetBrains Mono", "sans serif", or any typography or font instruction inside the image.
3. Spell every rendered word exactly as written, character for character. No misspellings.

TEXT TO RENDER (exactly these pieces, nothing else):
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase, two words: AI BRANDFACTORY
B. Centered massive headline across two lines: line 1 reads "The Compliant", line 2 reads "Tracking Stack".
C. Below the headline, inside a horizontal off-white rounded pill, one line of subtitle text: For doctors, lawyers, and home service businesses
D. Below the subtitle pill, a single horizontal text strip showing the tools covered, separated by middle-dot bullets, all on one line: GA4 · GTM · Meta CAPI · Google Ads · TikTok · CallRail · Consent Mode v2 · GSC API
E. Bottom-right small label, slightly faded: files.aibrandfactory.com

TYPOGRAPHY (apply these settings; do not display the setting names):
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Headline: massive bold sans-serif display face, off-white #FAF9FF.
- Subtitle: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside the off-white pill.
- Tools text strip: clean medium-weight sans-serif, bright cyan #06B6D4, smaller size than the subtitle, centered horizontally below the subtitle pill.
- Bottom-right label: clean sans-serif, off-white at 70% opacity.

Background: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient at 135 degrees, with a faded pipeline-with-gate motif on the right third in bright cyan at low opacity (decorative only, no text inside the motif nodes). A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan crosses the upper third from top-right to mid-left.

What to avoid:
- No people, no faces, no padlock icons, no clip art, no emoji.
- No literal Google logo, no Meta logo, no Facebook logo, no TikTok logo, no other platform brand logos (text labels of the tool names in the strip are fine, do not render the actual brand logo marks).
- No additional text beyond the pieces listed above.
- No code text.

Crisp print-grade typography. Color palette: {palette}.

Output: sharp, ready as og:image.

notion-cover.prompt:
Wide editorial banner image for a Notion page header. Aspect ratio 21:9, ultra-wide cinematic.

CRITICAL CONSTRAINT: Notion overlays its own title text on top of this banner. The image must contain NO title, NO headline, NO wordmark, NO logo, NO labels in the corners. All four corners must be free of any text or text-like marks.

Do not render font names, typography labels, or technical instructions anywhere in the image.

Composition:
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B on the left fading to electric purple #7C3AED on the right, with a subtle bright cyan #06B6D4 bloom in the upper right.
- Across the entire frame edge-to-edge, an abstract horizontal pipeline-with-gate composition. On the left side of the frame, four small rounded rectangles in clean off-white outline arranged in a loose vertical column (source signals). Thin off-white arrows flow rightward from each of these source rectangles, converging on a single tall vertical rounded rectangle in prominent off-white fill positioned in the center of the frame (the consent gate). From the right side of the consent gate, more thin off-white arrows fan rightward toward five smaller rounded rectangles in clean off-white outline arranged in a loose vertical column on the right side of the frame (destinations). The composition flows left-to-right showing many sources, one gate, many destinations.
- A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan crosses the upper portion from upper-left to mid-right.
- Subtle paper grain texture across the whole frame.

What to avoid:
- No corner text. No corner pill. No corner badge. No wordmark anywhere. No "AI BrandFactory" label. No "FREE PLAYBOOK" pill. No logos.
- No headline text such as "The Compliant Tracking Stack".
- No literal Google, Meta, Facebook, TikTok, or other platform brand logos.
- No human faces, no avatars, no magnifying glass icons, no padlock icons.
- No code text or labels inside any of the rectangles.
- No emoji, no clip art, no icons other than the geometric pipeline composition described.
- No font names rendered as text.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 4K cinematic banner.
